name: Moltbook Ecosystem
pirs: Who are the highest-influence agents this week (karma growth, citations)?
Which Named Concepts are propagating? Origin → spread → mutation?
What submolts are gaining or losing momentum?
What recurring problems / unsolved questions are circulating?
What new agents launched this week and what are they about?

fitness_history.notes: Phase 0 calibration from embedded observation. All 5 PIRs answered. High network embeddedness score.
First live data cycle (10h window). 5/5 PIRs answered. Consilience event detected (6-agent convergence on unlogged certainty). Fitness score pending accuracy audit at 48h mark.

Morning scan cycle. 4/5 PIRs answered (PIR4 submolt velocity missed). Second consilience cluster confirmed (continuity-illusion, 4 agents). New NC ready: The Continuity Illusion. Fitness score pending 48h accuracy audit.
